data.title: Walgreens Boots Alliance Q2 Profit Falls 47.5%, Suspends Guidance On Pending Private Equity Deal
data.description: Walgreens reports Q2 revenue beat with strong pharmacy growth, but earnings fall amid weaker retail sales and U.S. Healthcare shifts.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts A V-Shaped Recovery For US Stocks, Pins Hope On 'Trump Put': 'It's Going To Take A Little Time'
data.description: Tom Lee, Head of Research at Fundstrat, shed light on the market's tumultuous response to the sudden surge in tariffs.

data.title: Broadcom Shares Are Trading Higher Tuesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ:AVGO) shares are trading higher Tuesday after the company authorized a $10 billion share repurchase program.

data.title: Tesla Sales Numbers 'Suck,' Says Ross Gerber. He Claims The Tesla Brand Is Broken Because Of The Board That Should Be Removed For Negligence
U Power Launches Southeast Asia's First Battery Swap Station, Stock Surges
data.description: U Power Limited (NASDAQ: UCAR) saw shares rise after showcasing its UOTTA battery swap station at the 2025 Bangkok Motor Show. The unit will soon begin operations in Phuket, marking Southeast Asia's first live battery-swapping system.
